name: Service Arts & Ventures LLC
subtitle: Experiential Direction & Design
bio: Kenyon Q. Smith designs experiences that make brands impossible to ignore. By combining creative strategy, experiential design, visualization, and fabrication expertise, he helps companies communicate ideas more effectively, engage consumers more deeply, and maximize the impact of every activation. Every project is approached as an opportunity to transform ambitious ideas into memorable, meaningful brand experiences.

education.text: Bachelor of Fine Arts, Savannah College of Art & Design

awards.text: Micro-Influencer Strategy, Winner, 7th Annual Shorty Impact Awards

footer: Kenyon Q. Smith — All Rights Reserved
